stories.title: PremAccounts supports stopping and restarting name markets
acceptance_criteria: PremAccounts query service supports a marketsStatus GraphQL query that returns a list of markets and their enabled/disabled statuses
PremAccounts plugin has updateMarketStatus(market name length, enable bool) to enable/disable a market
PremAccounts service has update_market_status action (market name length, enable bool) that updates the market status in the service table
PremAccounts service markets table has a new field tracking market status, updated by update_market_status and exposed via GraphQL
PremAccounts-related services/plugins are wired into the existing build system so that the repository build (for example via make and cargo-psibase build) succeeds without errors

stories.title: Markets can be explicitly started and stopped from the Config app
acceptance_criteria: Config UI has a new Premium Market Config tab
Config UI Market Config tab shows a list with columns 'Market (account name length)' and 'Status'; Market lists lengths 1–10, Status shows enabled/disabled
User can stop and restart a particular market from the PremAccounts/Config UI

stories.title: Add a GraphQL query test for PremAccounts
acceptance_criteria: PremAccounts (or its query service) has at least one test that drives the GraphQL endpoint via serveSys in a psibase::test_case
Test seeds chain state via actions, builds an HttpRequest for POST /graphql, calls serveSys, and asserts on response (no errors, expected data)
Test runs with cargo psibase test and passes

stories.title: Add a test per PremAccounts service action
acceptance_criteria: Each PremAccounts service action (e.g. update_market_status) has a corresponding psibase::test_case that pushes the action and asserts on return value or table state
Tests use Table::with_service where needed to read tables; use chain.start_block() when reusing same action in same block
All action tests run with cargo psibase test and pass

stories.title: Add minimal UI tests on a launched local chain
acceptance_criteria: A minimal integration test (or script) launches psinode with a test config, boots the chain (cargo psibase install for relevant packages), and curls the PremAccounts/Config UI subdomain
Test asserts HTTP 200 and that the response contains expected initial content (e.g. HTML) for the default/initial state of the page(s) under test
No user interaction or browser automation required; initially-served state only
